post.description: Log in with username and password.

get.description: Get current user profile from token. Returns 401 if not authenticated.

schema.title: Response Api List Articles Api V1 Articles Get

put.description: Edit an article: update content, commit to git, re-enter pool.

get.description: Check if a user has already forked this article.

post.description: Explicitly publish a draft article to the sedimentation pool.

get.description: Compile article to PDF and return as downloadable file.

post.description: Fork an article: clone its git repo and create a new Article record.
Rollback to a previous commit (creates a new commit, not force-push).

schema.title: Response List Reviews Api V1 Articles  Article Id  Reviews Get

post.description:
Post a message in a review thread. Only the article author and the review's
reviewer can participate; bystanders get 403.

schema.title: Response Post Thread Message Api V1 Articles  Article Id  Reviews  Review Id  Messages Post
Response Api List Users Api V1 Users Get

put.description: Update user profile. Only self-editable. Name is immutable.

schema.title: Response Api Get Followers Api V1 Users  User Id  Followers Get
Response Api Get Following Api V1 Users  User Id  Following Get

get.description: List sedimentation articles from followed/following users, sorted by remaining time descending.
Articles from users the viewer follows, newest first.
Search articles by title and source content.

post.description:
Compile raw content and return rendered output.

⛔ DEPRECATED (2026-06-06): Markdown compilation moved to client-side (frontend/src/utils/markdown.ts, marked + KaTeX). Typst compilation via Tauri sidecar (Slice 2). These endpoints are kept for backward compatibility only. Do not use in new code. Will be removed in a future version.

Compile raw content and return as downloadable file.

Markdown → HTML file download, Typst → PDF file download.
